name: Ayam Masak Aceh (Butterfly Cornish Game Hen)
recipeIngredient: 2 Cornish game hens, about 1 pound each
3 to 7 fresh hot red chiles, seeded and sliced
2 stalks Lemon grass or 1 slice Lemon grass
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the game hens open from the breast side and flatten them into a butterfly shape. Discard loose skin and fat.
2. Broil the hens for 3 minutes on each side.
3. Process the shallots, garlic, coriander, chiles, ginger, turmeric, salt, lime juice, and half of the coconut milk in a blender to create a smooth sauce.
4. Marinate the hens in the sauce for 15 minutes.
5. Place the hens in a large skillet and cook over moderate heat for 10 minutes uncovered.
6. Add the remaining coconut milk and lemon grass to the skillet. Bring to a boil and cook for 30 minutes, basting occasionally until the hens are tender and almost all the liquid has evaporated.
7. Serve warm.
